ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "symbiotic_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of symbiotic relationship (e.g., AM, EM) */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the species */,
  "growth_habit" TEXT /* Growth habit of the species */,
  "leaf_type" TEXT /* Type of leaf */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbiotic_types" (
  "symbiotic_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbiotic type */,
  "symbiotic_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the symbiotic type (e.g., AM, EM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symbiotic type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbiotic_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "selection_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species */,
  "c_selection" REAL /* C selection metric */,
  "s_selection" REAL /* S selection metric */,
  "r_selection" REAL /* R selection metric */,
  "selection_date" TEXT /* Date the selection metrics were calculated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_selection_metrics_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "csr_levels" (
  "csr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CSR level record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species */,
  "csr_categorical_level" TEXT /* Categorical level of resource acquisition strategy */,
  "csr_description" TEXT /* Description of the CSR level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("csr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_csr_levels_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "csr_binary_metrics" (
  "binary_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the binary metrics record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species */,
  "csr_binary_70" TEXT /* CSR binary metric at 70% threshold */,
  "csr_binary_85" TEXT /* CSR binary metric at 85% threshold */,
  "csr_binary_90" TEXT /* CSR binary metric at 90% threshold */,
  "csr_binary_92" TEXT /* CSR binary metric at 92% threshold */,
  "csr_binary_95" TEXT /* CSR binary metric at 95% threshold */,
  "binary_date" TEXT /* Date the binary metrics were calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("binary_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_csr_binary_metrics_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lead researcher */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_goals" TEXT /* Goals of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliated institution of the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_species" (
  "project_species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-species association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species being studied */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the species in the project (e.g., focal species, comparator species) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_species_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_species_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_used" TEXT /* Description of the data used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_data" (
  "project_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project */,
  "collaborator_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborator */,
  "collaborator_email" TEXT /* Email address of the collaborator */,
  "collaborator_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliated institution of the collaborator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding agency */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "agency_email" TEXT /* Email address of the funding agency */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_agencies_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was written */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
